title: stachys lanigera
intro: Stachys lanigera, commonly known as woolly hedge nettle, is a perennial plant species in the mint family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Stachys lanigera include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as provide relief from digestive problems and skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
